---
title: "Spine Map"
format: revealjs
---

![](media/spine_content_map.png){.absolute width="900"}

::: notes
We've seen this map of the process of fitting models before
:::

##  

![](media/spine_lec_04.png){.absolute width="900"}

::: notes
Today we focus back on the model itself to look at the form of the model we're fitting. The faded stuff still applies though - we'll look at bias, robust models, and of course samples and estimation and so on. But they are the same as for other models, what is different is the form of the model we're fitting.
:::
